name: Notify Fernando (Operational Notifications)
description: Story 7.5 AC-3/AC-4: Sends WhatsApp notifications to Fernando via Evolution API for key pipeline events: proposal ready, content delivered, FunWheel published, lead captured.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'notify-fernando', event: $('Validate & Format Message').item.json.type, status: 'success', metadata: { client: $('Validate & Format Message').item.json.client, sent_at: $('Validate & Format Message').item.json.sent_at } }) }}
